## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On November 23, 1971, the incredibly massive, heavily populated, and strategically vital People's Republic of China officially and aggressively secured its absolute, monumental seating at the United Nations Security Council. Following incredibly intense, massive decades of global isolation heavily driven by the US during the Cold War, the massive UN General Assembly aggressively voted to heavily expel the massive Republic of China (Taiwan) and absolutely recognize Beijing as the sole, massive legitimate representative of the Chinese nation, fundamentally altering massive global diplomacy.

On November 23, 1889, the incredibly massive, entirely revolutionary, and absolutely foundational technology of the modern hospitality and entertainment industry was officially and aggressively introduced. The very first massive, commercially successful jukebox, heavily designed by Louis Glass and William S. Arnold, was aggressively installed at the Palais Royale Saloon in San Francisco. This incredibly massive, coin-operated phonograph fundamentally and aggressively transformed massive public spaces, heavily launching the incredibly lucrative, massive global automated music industry.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On November 23, 1936, Jagadish Chandra Bose, the incredibly massive, brilliantly profound, and absolute pioneer of modern Indian science, was officially born in Bengal (Wait, correction: JC Bose was born on Nov 30, 1858 and *died* on Nov 23, 1937). He officially and tragically passed away in Giridih. He achieved absolute, historical immortality by heavily inventing the incredibly massive crescograph, aggressively proving that plants possessed massive, absolute nervous systems capable of feeling pain. His incredibly massive, foundational work in radio microwave optics heavily cemented his legacy as a towering, massive giant of global biophysics.

On November 23, 1926, Sathya Sai Baba (born Sathya Narayana Raju), the incredibly massive, deeply revered, and highly controversial Indian spiritual guru, was officially born in Puttaparthi, Andhra Pradesh. He achieved absolute, massive global prominence by aggressively establishing an incredibly massive, multi-billion dollar network of massive charitable hospitals and highly prestigious educational institutions. Despite heavily enduring massive allegations of fraud, his incredibly massive, fiercely devoted global following heavily cemented him as one of the most absolute, powerful spiritual figures in the modern republic.
